events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes structural welding on a commercial project, rough-complete stage, with visible undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion. Reference is AWS D1.1. These are weld defects that are non-compliant per AWS D1.1 acceptance criteria. Decision should be fail. Risk is high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Findings list the defect cues. Actions: repair/rework welds, NDT inspection, etc.
